summary: A clip from a Fox News segment with a FOX NEWS ALERT banner. It shows a reporter standing in a city setting labeled NEW YORK CITY, a split screen of a woman at a podium and a man speaking outdoors at microphones, and a graphic with a framed booking photo captioned with a name, ILLEGAL MIGRANT FROM COLOMBIA, CONVICTED OF STALKING, and CONVICTED OF RAPE OF A MINOR, sourced to DHS. Lower-thirds read NY DEMS SET TO PASS LIMITS ON I.C.E. COOPERATION and NY DEM GOV & BORDER CZAR LOCKED IN SHOWDOWN.

A split screen shows a woman at a podium and a man speaking outdoors; lower-third reads NY DEM GOV & BORDER CZAR LOCKED IN SHOWDOWN.
A graphic shows a framed booking photo with the captions ILLEGAL MIGRANT FROM COLOMBIA, CONVICTED OF STALKING, and CONVICTED OF RAPE OF A MINOR, sourced to DHS.
